Method.Name: main
createViewSqlStmt
createSQLStatement140
Method.Source: private str createSQLStatement140() { str sqlStmt = strFmt(@"SELECT CONVERT([NVARCHAR](128), r.name) AS %1, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](255), r.type) AS %2, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](255), r.reason) AS %3, r.valid_since AS %4, r.last_refresh AS %5, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](128), r.state) AS %6, r.is_executable_action AS %7, r.is_revertable_action AS %8, r.execute_action_start_time AS %9, DATEDIFF(second, '00:00:00', r.execute_action_duration) AS %10, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](128), r.execute_action_initiated_by) AS %11, r.execute_action_initiated_time AS %12, r.revert_action_start_time AS %13, DATEDIFF(second, '00:00:00', r.revert_action_duration) AS %14, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](128), r.revert_action_initiated_by) AS %15, r.revert_action_initiated_time AS %16, r.score AS %17, CONVERT([NVARCHAR](MAX), r.details) AS %18, 1010 AS %19 FROM sys.dm_db_tuning_recommendations r", asName, asType, asReason, asValidSince, asLastRefresh, asState, asIsExecutableAction, asIsRevertableAction, asExecuteActionStartTime, asExecuteActionDuration, asExecuteActionInitiatedBy, asExecuteActionInitiatedTime, asRevertActionStartTime, asRevertActionDuration, asRevertActionInitiatedBy, asRevertActionInitiatedTime, asScore, asDetails, asRecId); return sqlStmt; }

Method.Name: createSQLStatementFallback
Method.Source: private str createSQLStatementFallback() { str sqlStmt = strFmt(@"SELECT '' AS %1, '' AS %2, '' AS %3, GETUTCDATE() AS %4, GETUTCDATE() AS %5, '' AS %6, 0 AS %7, 0 AS %8, GETUTCDATE() AS %9, 0 AS %10, '' AS %11, GETUTCDATE() AS %12, GETUTCDATE() AS %13, 0 AS %14, '' AS %15, GETUTCDATE() AS %16, 0 AS %17, '' AS %18, 1010 AS %19 FROM sys.databases r WHERE 1=0", asName, asType, asReason, asValidSince, asLastRefresh, asState, asIsExecutableAction, asIsRevertableAction, asExecuteActionStartTime, asExecuteActionDuration, asExecuteActionInitiatedBy, asExecuteActionInitiatedTime, asRevertActionStartTime, asRevertActionDuration, asRevertActionInitiatedBy, asRevertActionInitiatedTime, asScore, asDetails, asRecId); return sqlStmt; }

Method.Name: createSQLStatement
initialize
construct
